evidence: Repo exposes documentation and validators but no orchestration runtime.
impact: The system cannot execute recursive architecture evolution as a program.
title: Missing executable coordination kernel

evidence: No canonical state store existed under /AAS/runtime/state.
No per-swarm CSSM isolation surfaces existed for Alpha/Beta/Gamma.
impact: Agents cannot reason against versioned architecture state or compare futures.
title: No canonical CSSM snapshots or isolated swarm state

evidence: The repo had durable invention history but no machine-readable ACR.
No executable task dependency graph or proposal registry existed.
impact: Capability-aware assignment and proposal-driven execution were impossible.
title: No agent capability registry, proposal registry, or task graph runtime

evidence: No recovery manifest or deterministic resume source existed.
impact: The system could not be observed, audited, or resumed after interruption.
title: No telemetry or recovery control plane

evidence: The expected /AAS/config directory was absent before bootstrap.
impact: Initialization depended on manual extraction rather than deterministic loading.
title: Configuration pack was archived but not materialized as a runtime directory
